hashtag_note: Public TikTok hashtag view counts are no longer exposed by the platform; #buildabear scale is tracked manually via TikTok Creative Center (roadmap).

cards.p: Build-A-Bear runs 'The Bear Cave' — an 18+ online line of 'gifts just for adults,' promoted directly on its TikTok. Explicit adult targeting, not incidental.
Influencer 'stuffing parties' and limited drops sell fast; older buyers are not discount-driven and make multiple purchases.
Points + early access to limited drops make loyalty feel like a collector's club, not a rewards card.
Collector demand concentrates in Pokémon, Sanrio/Hello Kitty, Star Wars, My Little Pony and How to Train Your Dragon lines.
